channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Allison Jones Named EVP of A&R at Big Machine Records/Nashville Harbor Records & Entertainment
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest music industry update. We've got some exciting news from Big Machine Records and Nashville Harbor Records & Entertainment. The label has just appointed Allison Jones as Executive VP of A&R.
[Short music transition]
Host: Jones is a seasoned industry veteran who's been with Big Machine since 2008. During her time at the label, she's played a crucial role in signing top artists like Thomas Rhett, Florida Georgia Line, and Riley Green, and has contributed to the success of superstars like Tim McGraw, Lady A, and Taylor Swift.
[Short music transition]
Host: Jones has a long history with Big Machine founder Scott Borchetta, dating back to 1997 when they launched DreamWorks Nashville together. In a statement, Jones expressed her pride in the music they've created and her excitement to take on this new role.
[Short music transition]
Host: Borchetta himself praised Jones, calling her the "consummate A&R executive" who's always on top of the latest trends and music. He credits her with being instrumental in shaping the label into what it is today.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's the latest from the music industry. Allison Jones is set to lead A&R efforts at Big Machine Records and Nashville Harbor Records & Entertainment, working with a impressive roster of artists including Rascal Flatts, The Band Perry, and Aaron Lewis. We'll be keeping an eye on what's next for this powerhouse team. Thanks for tuning in!
